description: LIEF is a library to instrument executable formats. It supports PE, ELF, Mach-O, and DEX formats. Useful for binary analysis and patching.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/lief && python3 lief.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/lief && python3 lief.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/lief && python3 lief.py --help`. Library to Instrument Executable Formats (PE, ELF, Mach-O).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: Library to Instrument Executable Formats (PE, ELF, Mach-O).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Library to Instrument Executable Formats (PE, ELF, Mach-O).
